category_sources: source_facts.description says libu2f-server is the server-side of the Universal 2nd Factor U2F protocol.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name gives libu2f-server; the official Yubico developers page and GitHub repository use the same name.
docs_sources: source_facts.homepage is the official Yubico developers page dedicated to libu2f-server.
repo_sources: Official GitHub repository Yubico/libu2f-server identifies the project as Yubico Universal 2nd Factor U2F Server C Library.
tags_sources: source_facts.description names Universal 2nd Factor U2F server-side functionality; source_facts.homepage is the official Yubico project page.
